name: Hobo Buns
recipeIngredient: 3 each Kaiser or french rolls, split
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and mustard.
2. Spread the mixture over the cut sides of the split rolls.
3. Place the bottom halves of the rolls on a serving plate.
4. Top each roll with bologna, tomato, green pepper, and cheese.
5. Cover with the top halves of the rolls.
6. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes until the cheese begins to melt.
